name: Tsukuyomi
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Tsukuyomi embodies moon, hunt, wilderness — under Moon; in Cancer, Sagittarius.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Asclepius
related.teaser: Asclepius embodies healing, medicine — under Sun · Mercury; in Virgo.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Ma’at
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Loki
related.teaser: Loki embodies trickery, change, mischief — under Mercury · Uranus; in Gemini, Aquarius.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: Manannan mac Lir
related.teaser: Manannan mac Lir embodies sea, tides, earthquakes — under Neptune/Moon; in Pisces, Cancer.

related.name: ☽ Moon
related.teaser: The Moon is the tide of psyche — dream mirror, womb of waters, keeper of illusion.

related.name: Njord
related.teaser: Njord embodies sea, tides, earthquakes — under Neptune/Moon; in Pisces, Cancer.

related.name: Idunn
related.teaser: Idunn embodies poetry, music, craft — under Mercury; in Gemini, Pisces.

related.name: Benzaiten
related.teaser: Benzaiten embodies poetry, music, craft — under Mercury; in Gemini, Pisces.

related.name: ♆ Neptune
related.teaser: Neptune is the ocean of spirit — dream wave, mystic tide, abyss of compassion.
